title: CobbleGuard
description: Cobblemon ServerSide-Mod that adds a Fight-Or-Flight Behaviour
body:
🛡️ CobbeGuard - Smarter Wild Pokémon & Combat AI for Cobblemon
CobbeGuard is an open-source, server-side mod for Cobblemon, designed to add reactive behavior and advanced combat AI to Pokémon in your world. Inspired by FOF and built from scratch, it's made for immersion, challenge, and automation—no client mod required.

⚙️ Core Features:
Follower Battle AI:
If caught, your Pokémon will automatically attack any entity you attack, using appropriate moves based on type advantage.

Wild Behavior:
Wild Pokémon will fight back if their stats are higher than the attacker's, or run away if they're weaker.

Aggressive Wild Encounters:
Certain Pokémon will automatically attack players nearby. Those Pokémon are based on their stats.

Smart Move Usage:
Pokémon will choose moves based on type effectiveness. For example, a Fire-type will prefer Fire moves against Grass-types before using neutral moves.

Two Types of Attacks:

Ranged: Used if the target is far; range increases with Pokémon size.

Melee: Used when close enough.

🔥 Type-Based Effects:
Each move type applies a unique effect:

Type	Effect
Fire	Sets target on fire; damage and duration scale with level
Ice	    Freezes and slows target; moderate damage
Poison	Applies poison effect and small damage
Fighting / Steel	Applies weakness and damage
Ground / Rock	Direct damage
Electric	Electrifies target; causes damage in water and adds extra zap effect
Water	Applies “Bubbling” – removes air for a few seconds; deals damage
Bug	Applies “Cobweb” – restricts movement and does damage
Grass	Heals the attacker slightly on hit; deals damage
Flying	Adds extra knockback; deals damage
Dragon	Heavy damage

* Some of the Effects are not added yet, those will be added in a future. 

🎮 Other Features:
Commands:

Toggle whether Pokémon attack players.

Command Pokémon to stop attacking.

On fail catching outside a battle, Pokémon will attack you.

Remote targeting (mark enemies for Pokémon to attack).

Experience System:
Pokémon gain experience when defeating other Pokémon. Also it drops experience and items.
Visual effects and icons

📋 Compatibility

Added Compat to all Claim Mods (FLan, OpenParties, GriefDefender)

Added Compat with Plushies, PokeStops, CobbleBosses.
